summary: Analyst consensus $3.81, range $3.55-$3.97, prior Q actual $3.72, YoY comp $3.23
content: Yahoo Finance analyst consensus for MSFT FQ2 FY2026 (Oct-Dec 2025): $3.81 avg from 31 analysts. Low: $3.55, High: $3.97. Year-ago: $3.23. Prior quarter (FQ1 FY2026) actual: $3.72, which beat the $3.66 consensus. Trend-based models suggest $3.86-$3.93. Microsoft has beaten EPS estimates consistently. Operating margins expanded to 48.9% in FQ1.
